'''Arl Nidder''' was one of the underlings of [[Zekka Thyne]] who dreamed of becoming a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] and owning a suit of [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|Mandalorian armor]]. He was shot and killed by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] in disguise as [[Jodo Kast]] while daydreaming that the hunter would take him under his wing.
